title: The Fisherman and the Fish
lines: A Fisherman cast his net into the sea and hauled it in, but found he had caught nothing but small fish and useless things.
He threw back the worthless catch and went away in despair.
Another Fisherman came by and cast his net in the same spot.
He hauled in a great catch of large, fine fish.
"Why should you have such good fortune and I none?" asked the first Fisherman.
"Because," said the second, "I did not give up after one attempt."
